calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of Minor.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Three Minors.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Paul V. Melodia, Esq. appeared with petitioner Felix A. Chen, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Allison Chen.
Petitioner were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $5,000,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $812,769.00.
Other Authorized Payments to Third Parties - $3,362,832.00.
Costs - $59,316.00.

The net balance of $765,083.00 shall to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Attachment 7c(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Compromise.

Order approving the compromise of a disputed claim or a minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
